ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment was made on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the comment */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is hidden from public view */,
  "hidden_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was hidden */,
  "hidden_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who hid the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_hidden_by FOREIGN KEY ("hidden_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_deleted_by FOREIGN KEY ("deleted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the post is locked for new comments */,
  "locked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was locked */,
  "locked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who locked the post */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_locked_by FOREIGN KEY ("locked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being classified */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the classification */,
  "identity_hate" REAL /* Probability of the comment being identity hate */,
  "insult" REAL /* Probability of the comment being an insult */,
  "obscene" REAL /* Probability of the comment being obscene */,
  "severe_toxic" REAL /* Probability of the comment being severely toxic */,
  "threat" REAL /* Probability of the comment being a threat */,
  "toxic" REAL /* Probability of the comment being toxic */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Overall confidence of the classification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the classification was made */,
  "classified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that made the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_classified_by FOREIGN KEY ("classified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being modified */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was modified */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the comment */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., edited, deleted) */,
  "old_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment before the edit */,
  "new_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment after the edit */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the edit or deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that the role can perform */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object that the action can be performed on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification being analyzed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the analytics process */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics entry that generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., toxic comment report) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id")
)
